TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Mei Cienwu foksi == Mei Cienwu (Rev. Campbell Naismith Moody,1865-1940), o Scotland a tamdaw, I 1865 miheca 11 folad 10 romi'ad masofoc i Benvue Bothwall no Scotland, o mama ci Robert Moody, o ina ci Mary Ewing Naismith, 2 ko fafahiyan a kaka, 1 ko kaka to fa'inayan, 1 ko safa to fa'inayan, o mitooray to Wama a Kawas a laloma'an. O mama mitiliday no pingkosi i Glasgow, o ina nai tadamaanay laloma'an i Hamilton ko sofoc. Misawad nai sinkakoyin i, tayra i Bren sinkakoyin no daykako to 1 miheca i Switzerland, ta itira i Mission no Gallowgate i Glasgow a matayal. Ira ko cecay dadaya matengil ningra ko nano sowal no hakasi ci Buckley to pakayniay pipatenak i Taywan, nanoya sa pacekil ko faloco' mihayda to tahidang no Kawas, patala to saka tayra i Taywan. Miliyas to kitakit tayra i Taywan Saka mitelek ci Mei Cienwu to saka tayni i Taywan, nika caay ka fana'en no mato'asay, nawhani mahadang to pilalang no mato'asay, mamalingad to han pasifana' to ina, saka mararom sato a tomangic ko ina, nanoyaan miliyas to salawina tayni i Taywan. Ira ci Dr. David Landsborough (Lan Tafiti), M.D. aci Rev. A.B.Nielson (Lien Tili), tatolo cangra i 1895 miheca 12 folad 18 romi'ad talasekal i Anpin, itira ci Lin Yincen singsi minanam to pasifana' to sowal no Payrang. Patenakay a Mei Cienwu I 1896 miheca 11 folad ci Mei Cienwu aci Lan Tafiti ising rakat sa tayra i Canghua, miteka patenak paising, patireng ko Inkiris ciwlo kiwkay i Canghua to saka tosa patenakan (itira Taynan ko todong), ci Mei Cienwu sa patireng i Dadu, Ailan, Qieding (Xiluo) to pacena'an, o pahanhanan no sinkiwsi a maro', manga'ay kinapinapina maro' to cecay mihecaan, misolap to kafiyaw niyaro' patireng to fa'elohay kiwkay, ikor matama to ko pacarcaran a kahiceraan maro', samatiyaen ni Mei Cienwu to no Inkiris mihacecay to niyaro' a misinting, misakamiday ko 'orip a patenak, o koheting epang no Scotland ko nikaenan, o matiyaay 'awa no siri a nisanga'an a la'pa, ano eca o sakongkong ko sapi'ang'ang to tamdaw sawal sa "masidayay no Kawas a wawa" saan ko pitahidang to finawlan a patenak, ano ira ko mitooray, itira sa micaliw to loma kamaro'an, itira padoedo mipatenak to Ratoh, maraod ko pa'aliwacan patorod han ko itiraay kiwkay macacaliw mikerid to lihay, ano eca ocoren ko tintosi pakatayal. Matiraay ko kalasida'it ni Mei Cienwu palecad to Lan Tafiti ising to isingan patenak, masamatira i tatenokan no Taywan nai 1896 miheca tangasa 1906 miheca to 10 mihecaan, mapatireng ko 18 a kiwkay itiya, o mitooray nai 1300 ko tamdaw matongal tangasa 4200 ko tamdaw, tatenokan no Taywan sa'etal halo Taycong, Canghua ato Nantu 1100 ko niyaro', nirakatan ni Mei Cienwu 900 ko niyaro' nipatenakan. Mapatireng ningra ko Lukang, Ershui, Liuyuan, Xihu, Qingshui, Dali, Fangyuan, Fengyuan, Caotun, Yuanlin, Chishui, Hemei, Zhushan, Dadu, Dacheng, Tianzhong, Beitou, Erlin a kiwkayan. Kawasan Mei Cienwu foksi Ci Mei Cienwu foksi o tadamaanay Kawasan i Inkiris tadamaanay, kala mitiliday ho a mihecaan, maocor no sinkakoyin tayra i Glasgow and Edinburgh sinkakoyin makihatiya to mihecaan kasasowalan sa'opo. I 1929 miheca matahidang mihakitiya i Bnuce Lecture, ni Blues papelo, patodongan i The Purpose of Christ (patosokan ni Kristo), ikor palatilidan koni a nisowalan. Ira ko 12 mitilidan a cudad ni Mei Cienwu foksi, 4 a tilidan no Taywan (piwiyci): Loma, sapatenak, to'ekan a kiwkay, kotosimon a tilidan. Ira ko 8 no Inkiris a cudad, 1.The Heathen Heart. 2.The Saints of Formosa. 3.Love's Long Campaign. 4.The mind of the Early Coverts. 5.Christ for us and is us. 6.The purpose of Christ. 7.The King Guest. 8.The childhood of the Church. I 1932 miheca nitilidan a The mind of the Early Coverts (Sarakatay to'ek faloco' no mifalicay) a tilidan mapatodong no Glasgow daykako to hakasi no Kawasan (D.D). Maradiway ci Mei Cienwu foksi Talolong ko saki radiwan ni Mei Cienwu foksi, matiya o fafahi ni Lan Taypi ising malatiyin no katimolay daykay misanga' to radiw, nisanga'an ningra telangay radiw saka 25A, 45, 46, 217, 266 limaay a radiw. Tatenokan adihayay kiwkay a sikatay cingra ko pasa'opoay misakapot. Kararamod ni Mei Cienwu foksi I 1908 miheca ci ramod ci Mei Cienwu foksi aci Miss Margaret Findlay, o nano Glasgow daykako a hakasi ci Dr. Larkhou a wawa to fafahiyan, nika karaadadaay ko tireng, sapidipotaw ni Mei Cienwu foksi tayra i New Zealand, Japan ko pipaising, masakalimelaan i 1915 miheca 11 folad 8 romi'ad a mapatay, pitadem toya romi'ad I lalan no Canghua i, oya nikeridan ni Mei Cienwu foksi a sikatay mitomtomay miparadiw to "Awaay ko pades i kakarayan mida'oc ko 'orip" sanay o pipatenak todong koni. I 1922 miheca, ci Mei Cienwu foksi ciramod to kakeridan kangkoho no Canghua isingan ci Miss Margaret Arthur itiya, ikor citodongay to fafahiyan a tayal no Inkiris ciwlo kiwkay to pinapina mihecaan. Ira ko 76 mihecaan mapatay i Inkiris. O katadamaan ni Mei Cienwu foksi (1) Malalokay ko tayal Caay ka rorayen patenak ci Mei Cienwu foksi, mihadidi to so'aw ato cahiw, kacidalan ka'oradan caay pahanhan, ira ko pasowalay cingraan eca to haenen ko roray, masamo'aw to tatirengan, paca'of sa ikaka to koedaway no 'orip ko nga'ay, mapatay i tayal no Kawan o kalipahakan. (2) Kao niyah to no tao ko pisafangcal Saka'emed sa ko kaciriko' no niyah, o cecay romi'ad no sinkiwsi, samatiya sa o miki'a'amay ko kaciriko' no Inkiris ci Mei Cienwu foksi, misa'icel pacakat to payso, pacakat to 4500 sapatireng to kiwkay no Canghua, pacakat to 1000 payso sapatireng to Nanto kiwkay, pacakat to 1000 payso sapatireng to Tayciw kiwkay, roma i, o Qingshui, Caotun, Ershui, Xihu, Pingtung, Douliu kiwkay ato sera ko pacakay, halipadangay to pakoyocay, adadaay, tintosi, patado micoker to sadama, makalic sa to cinamalay o sasereday kisya, materek ko payso, maala ko 2 miheca mapatireng ko 1 kiwkay. (3) Malalen ko nengneng Malalen ko nengneng to cidafongay, ci'icelay tamdaw ato caayay ka tadamaan nengnengen a tamdaw, o sedi no tawa ko sapilitemoh, pananom, o sowal no Taywan tamdaw ko pilicay, masadak talapotal o niya sa ko miwikiday, caay palifot to tao, sowal sa cingra: "Ci Yis komi'orongay to ciwcika no niyah" saan. Ira ko cecay romi'ad, i Sihu misinting cikafoti'an to toloay laya' ko dadahal aci Lin Siekong foksi padal, itira sa i Nanto misinting koemeday a liwkang ko kamaro'an, hadidi sa to pikalat no cenget a mafoti'. (4) Halitolonay Ci Mei Cienwu foksi, 'ayaw no pisinting, ikor o pitolon, manengneng to no lafalafang ko pitolon ningra, i parad no kiwkay, mateli ko misac no salikaka, rariden ningra a mitolon. Mapatay Na patiko nai Taya misinting ci Mei Cienwu foksi, madenga no lifong, i 1924 miheca minokay tayra Inkiris. I 1927 miheca nai Scotland patono to ta'angay toki pafeli to Canghua kiwkay piharatengan to 'ayaway fafahi ci Miss Margaret Findlayan. I 1940 miheca 2 folad 28 romi'ad mapatay i Lennoxtown no Scotland. Toya miheca, 6 folad 13 romi'ad, Tayciw ciwkay midemak to piharatengan cingraan a lihay i Canghua kiwkay.
S.PHON: == məi ʦiənwo~u~u fo~uksi == məi ʦiənwo~u~u (rəb~v. ʦampb~b~vəɾɾ naismitħ mo~uo~uɬ~ɮj,****-****), o~u sʦo~utɾanɬ~ɮ a tamɬ~ɮaw, i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maso~ufo~uʦ i b~b~vənb~vo~u~uə b~b~vo~utħwaɾɾ no~u sʦo~utɾanɬ~ɮ, o~u mama ʦi ro~ub~b~vərt mo~uo~uɬ~ɮj, o~u ina ʦi marj əwiŋ naismitħ, * ko~u fafaħijan a kaka, * ko~u kaka to~u faʡinajan, * ko~u safa to~u faʡinajan, o~u mito~uo~uraj to~u wama a kawas a ɾaɾo~umaʡan. o~u mama mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj no~u piŋko~usi i *ɾas*o~uw, o~u ina nai taɬ~ɮamaanaj ɾaɾo~umaʡan i ħamiɾto~un ko~u so~ufo~uʦ. misawaɬ~ɮ nai sinkako~ujin i, tajra i b~b~vrən sinkako~ujin no~u ɬ~ɮajkako~u to~u * miħəʦa i swit*ərɾanɬ~ɮ, ta itira i missio~un no~u *aɾɾo~uw*atə i *ɾas*o~uw a matajaɾ. ira ko~u ʦəʦaj ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja matəŋiɾ niŋra ko~u nano~u so~uwaɾ no~u ħakasi ʦi b~b~vo~u~uʦkɾəj to~u pakajniaj pipatənak i tajwan, nano~uja sa paʦəkiɾ ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ miħajɬ~ɮa to~u taħiɬ~ɮaŋ no~u kawas, pataɾa to~u saka tajra i tajwan. miɾijas to~u kitakit tajra i tajwan saka mitəɾək ʦi məi ʦiənwo~u~u to~u saka tajni i tajwan, nika ʦaaj ka fanaʡən no~u mato~uʡasaj, nawħani maħaɬ~ɮaŋ to~u piɾaɾaŋ no~u mato~uʡasaj, mamaɾiŋaɬ~ɮ to~u ħan pasifanaʡ to~u ina, saka mararo~um sato~u a to~umaŋiʦ ko~u ina, nano~ujaan miɾijas to~u saɾawina tajni i tajwan. ira ʦi ɬ~ɮr. ɬ~ɮab~viɬ~ɮ ɾanɬ~ɮsb~b~vo~uro~uo~u~u*ħ (ɾan tafiti), m.ɬ~ɮ. aʦi rəb~v. a.b~b~v.niəɾso~un (ɾiən tiɾi), tato~uɾo~u ʦaŋra i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ taɾasəkaɾ i anpin, itira ʦi ɾin jinʦən siŋsi minanam to~u pasifanaʡ to~u so~uwaɾ no~u pajraŋ. patənakaj a məi ʦiənwo~u~u i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ʦi məi ʦiənwo~u~u aʦi ɾan tafiti isiŋ rakat sa tajra i ʦaŋħo~u~ua, mitəka patənak paisiŋ, patirəŋ ko~u inkiris ʦiwɾo~u kiwkaj i ʦaŋħo~u~ua to~u saka to~usa patənakan (itira tajnan ko~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ), ʦi məi ʦiənwo~u~u sa patirəŋ i ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~u~u, aiɾan, *iəɬ~ɮiŋ (xiɾo~u~uo~u) to~u paʦənaʡan, o~u paħanħanan no~u sinkiwsi a maro~uʡ, maŋaʡaj kinapinapina maro~uʡ to~u ʦəʦaj miħəʦaan, miso~uɾap to~u kafijaw nijaro~uʡ patirəŋ to~u faʡəɾo~uħaj kiwkaj, iko~ur matama to~u ko~u paʦarʦaran a kaħiʦəraan maro~uʡ, samatijaən ni məi ʦiənwo~u~u to~u no~u inkiris miħaʦəʦaj to~u nijaro~uʡ a misintiŋ, misakamiɬ~ɮaj ko~u ʡo~urip a patənak, o~u ko~uħətiŋ əpaŋ no~u sʦo~utɾanɬ~ɮ ko~u nikaənan, o~u matijaaj ʡawa no~u siri a nisaŋaʡan a ɾaʡpa, ano~u əʦa o~u sako~uŋko~uŋ ko~u sapiʡaŋʡaŋ to~u tamɬ~ɮaw sawaɾ sa "masiɬ~ɮajaj no~u kawas a wawa" saan ko~u pitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u finawɾan a patənak, ano~u ira ko~u mito~uo~uraj, itira sa miʦaɾiw to~u ɾo~uma kamaro~uʡan, itira paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u mipatənak to~u rato~uħ, marao~uɬ~ɮ ko~u paʡaɾiwaʦan pato~uro~uɬ~ɮ ħan ko~u itiraaj kiwkaj maʦaʦaɾiw mikəriɬ~ɮ to~u ɾiħaj, ano~u əʦa o~uʦo~urən ko~u tinto~usi pakatajaɾ. matiraaj ko~u kaɾasiɬ~ɮaʡit ni məi ʦiənwo~u~u paɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u ɾan tafiti isiŋ to~u isiŋan patənak, masamatira i tatəno~ukan no~u tajwan nai **** miħəʦa taŋasa **** miħəʦa to~u ** miħəʦaan, mapatirəŋ ko~u ** a kiwkaj itija, o~u mito~uo~uraj nai **** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw mato~uŋaɾ taŋasa **** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, tatəno~ukan no~u tajwan saʡətaɾ ħaɾo~u tajʦo~uŋ, ʦaŋħo~u~ua ato~u nanto~u~u **** ko~u nijaro~uʡ, nirakatan ni məi ʦiənwo~u~u *** ko~u nijaro~uʡ nipatənakan. mapatirəŋ niŋra ko~u ɾo~u~ukaŋ, ərsħo~u~ui, ɾio~u~ujo~u~uan, xiħo~u~u, *iŋsħo~u~ui, ɬ~ɮaɾi, faŋjo~u~uan, fəŋjo~u~uan, ʦao~uto~u~un, jo~u~uanɾin, ʦħisħo~u~ui, ħəməi, *ħo~u~usħan, ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~u~u, ɬ~ɮaʦħəŋ, tian*ħo~uŋ, b~b~vəito~uo~u~u, ərɾin a kiwkajan. kawasan məi ʦiənwo~u~u fo~uksi ʦi məi ʦiənwo~u~u fo~uksi o~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj kawasan i inkiris taɬ~ɮamaanaj, kaɾa mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj ħo~u a miħəʦaan, mao~uʦo~ur no~u sinkako~ujin tajra i *ɾas*o~uw anɬ~ɮ əɬ~ɮinb~b~vo~u~ur*ħ sinkako~ujin makiħatija to~u miħəʦaan kasaso~uwaɾan saʡo~upo~u. i **** miħəʦa mataħiɬ~ɮaŋ miħakitija i b~b~vno~u~uʦə ɾəʦto~u~urə, ni b~b~vɾo~u~uəs papəɾo~u, pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan i tħə po~u~urpo~usə o~uf ʦħrist (pato~uso~ukan ni kristo~u), iko~ur paɾatiɾiɬ~ɮan ko~uni a niso~uwaɾan. ira ko~u ** mitiɾiɬ~ɮan a ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ ni məi ʦiənwo~u~u fo~uksi, * a tiɾiɬ~ɮan no~u tajwan (piwijʦi): ɾo~uma, sapatənak, to~uʡəkan a kiwkaj, ko~uto~usimo~un a tiɾiɬ~ɮan. ira ko~u * no~u inkiris a ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, *.tħə ħəatħən ħəart. *.tħə saints o~uf fo~urmo~usa. *.ɾo~ub~vəʡs ɾo~uŋ ʦampai*n. *.tħə minɬ~ɮ o~uf tħə əarɾj ʦo~ub~vərts. *.ʦħrist fo~ur o~u~us anɬ~ɮ is o~u~us. *.tħə po~u~urpo~usə o~uf ʦħrist. *.tħə kiŋ *o~u~uəst. *.tħə ʦħiɾɬ~ɮħo~uo~uɬ~ɮ o~uf tħə ʦħo~u~urʦħ. i **** miħəʦa nitiɾiɬ~ɮan a tħə minɬ~ɮ o~uf tħə əarɾj ʦo~ub~vərts (sarakataj to~uʡək faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u mifaɾiʦaj) a tiɾiɬ~ɮan mapato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u *ɾas*o~uw ɬ~ɮajkako~u to~u ħakasi no~u kawasan (ɬ~ɮ.ɬ~ɮ). maraɬ~ɮiwaj ʦi məi ʦiənwo~u~u fo~uksi taɾo~uɾo~uŋ ko~u saki raɬ~ɮiwan ni məi ʦiənwo~u~u fo~uksi, matija o~u fafaħi ni ɾan tajpi isiŋ maɾatijin no~u katimo~uɾaj ɬ~ɮajkaj misaŋaʡ to~u raɬ~ɮiw, nisaŋaʡan niŋra təɾaŋaj raɬ~ɮiw saka **a, **, **, ***, *** ɾimaaj a raɬ~ɮiw. tatəno~ukan aɬ~ɮiħajaj kiwkaj a sikataj ʦiŋra ko~u pasaʡo~upo~uaj misakapo~ut. kararamo~uɬ~ɮ ni məi ʦiənwo~u~u fo~uksi i **** miħəʦa ʦi ramo~uɬ~ɮ ʦi məi ʦiənwo~u~u fo~uksi aʦi miss mar*arət finɬ~ɮɾaj, o~u nano~u *ɾas*o~uw ɬ~ɮajkako~u a ħakasi ʦi ɬ~ɮr. ɾarkħo~uo~u~u a wawa to~u fafaħijan, nika karaaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj ko~u tirəŋ, sapiɬ~ɮipo~utaw ni məi ʦiənwo~u~u fo~uksi tajra i nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ, *apan ko~u pipaisiŋ, masakaɾiməɾaan i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a mapataj, pitaɬ~ɮəm to~uja ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i ɾaɾan no~u ʦaŋħo~u~ua i, o~uja nikəriɬ~ɮan ni məi ʦiənwo~u~u fo~uksi a sikataj mito~umto~umaj miparaɬ~ɮiw to~u "awaaj ko~u paɬ~ɮəs i kakarajan miɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ ko~u ʡo~urip" sanaj o~u pipatənak to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ko~uni. i **** miħəʦa, ʦi məi ʦiənwo~u~u fo~uksi ʦiramo~uɬ~ɮ to~u kakəriɬ~ɮan kaŋko~uħo~u no~u ʦaŋħo~u~ua isiŋan ʦi miss mar*arət artħo~u~ur itija, iko~ur ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u fafaħijan a tajaɾ no~u inkiris ʦiwɾo~u kiwkaj to~u pinapina miħəʦaan. ira ko~u ** miħəʦaan mapataj i inkiris. o~u kataɬ~ɮamaan ni məi ʦiənwo~u~u fo~uksi (*) maɾaɾo~ukaj ko~u tajaɾ ʦaaj ka ro~urajən patənak ʦi məi ʦiənwo~u~u fo~uksi, miħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮi to~u so~uʡaw ato~u ʦaħiw, kaʦiɬ~ɮaɾan kaʡo~uraɬ~ɮan ʦaaj paħanħan, ira ko~u paso~uwaɾaj ʦiŋraan əʦa to~u ħaənən ko~u ro~uraj, masamo~uʡaw to~u tatirəŋan, paʦaʡo~uf sa ikaka to~u ko~uəɬ~ɮawaj no~u ʡo~urip ko~u ŋaʡaj, mapataj i tajaɾ no~u kawan o~u kaɾipaħakan. (*) kao~u nijaħ to~u no~u tao~u ko~u pisafaŋʦaɾ sakaʡəməɬ~ɮ sa ko~u kaʦiriko~uʡ no~u nijaħ, o~u ʦəʦaj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ no~u sinkiwsi, samatija sa o~u mikiʡaʡamaj ko~u kaʦiriko~uʡ no~u inkiris ʦi məi ʦiənwo~u~u fo~uksi, misaʡiʦəɾ paʦakat to~u pajso~u, paʦakat to~u **** sapatirəŋ to~u kiwkaj no~u ʦaŋħo~u~ua, paʦakat to~u **** pajso~u sapatirəŋ to~u nanto~u kiwkaj, paʦakat to~u **** pajso~u sapatirəŋ to~u tajʦiw kiwkaj, ro~uma i, o~u *iŋsħo~u~ui, ʦao~uto~u~un, ərsħo~u~ui, xiħo~u~u, piŋto~u~uŋ, ɬ~ɮo~uo~u~uɾio~u~u kiwkaj ato~u səra ko~u paʦakaj, ħaɾipaɬ~ɮaŋaj to~u pako~ujo~uʦaj, aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj, tinto~usi, pataɬ~ɮo~u miʦo~ukər to~u saɬ~ɮama, makaɾiʦ sa to~u ʦinamaɾaj o~u sasərəɬ~ɮaj kisja, matərək ko~u pajso~u, maaɾa ko~u * miħəʦa mapatirəŋ ko~u * kiwkaj. (*) maɾaɾən ko~u nəŋnəŋ maɾaɾən ko~u nəŋnəŋ to~u ʦiɬ~ɮafo~uŋaj, ʦiʡiʦəɾaj tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u ʦaajaj ka taɬ~ɮamaan nəŋnəŋən a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u səɬ~ɮi no~u tawa ko~u sapiɾitəmo~uħ, panano~um, o~u so~uwaɾ no~u tajwan tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u piɾiʦaj, masaɬ~ɮak taɾapo~utaɾ o~u nija sa ko~u miwikiɬ~ɮaj, ʦaaj paɾifo~ut to~u tao~u, so~uwaɾ sa ʦiŋra: "ʦi jis ko~umiʡo~uro~uŋaj to~u ʦiwʦika no~u nijaħ" saan. ira ko~u ʦəʦaj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, i siħo~u~u misintiŋ ʦikafo~utiʡan to~u to~uɾo~uaj ɾajaʡ ko~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾ aʦi ɾin siəko~uŋ fo~uksi paɬ~ɮaɾ, itira sa i nanto~u misintiŋ ko~uəməɬ~ɮaj a ɾiwkaŋ ko~u kamaro~uʡan, ħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮi sa to~u pikaɾat no~u ʦəŋət a mafo~utiʡ. (*) ħaɾito~uɾo~unaj ʦi məi ʦiənwo~u~u fo~uksi, ʡajaw no~u pisintiŋ, iko~ur o~u pito~uɾo~un, manəŋnəŋ to~u no~u ɾafaɾafaŋ ko~u pito~uɾo~un niŋra, i paraɬ~ɮ no~u kiwkaj, matəɾi ko~u misaʦ no~u saɾikaka, rariɬ~ɮən niŋra a mito~uɾo~un. mapataj na patiko~u nai taja misintiŋ ʦi məi ʦiənwo~u~u fo~uksi, maɬ~ɮəŋa no~u ɾifo~uŋ, i **** miħəʦa mino~ukaj tajra inkiris. i **** miħəʦa nai sʦo~utɾanɬ~ɮ pato~uno~u to~u taʡaŋaj to~uki pafəɾi to~u ʦaŋħo~u~ua kiwkaj piħaratəŋan to~u ʡajawaj fafaħi ʦi miss mar*arət finɬ~ɮɾajan. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ mapataj i ɾənno~uxto~uwn no~u sʦo~utɾanɬ~ɮ. to~uja miħəʦa, * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, tajʦiw ʦiwkaj miɬ~ɮəmak to~u piħaratəŋan ʦiŋraan a ɾiħaj i ʦaŋħo~u~ua kiwkaj.
S.FORM: == Mei Cienwu foksi == Mei Cienwu (Rev. Campbell Naismith Moody,1865-1940), o Scotland a tamdaw, I 1865 miheca 11 folad 10 romi'ad masofoc i Benvue Bothwall no Scotland, o mama ci Robert Moody, o ina ci Mary Ewing Naismith, 2 ko fafahiyan a kaka, 1 ko kaka to fa'inayan, 1 ko safa to fa'inayan, o mitooray to Wama a Kawas a laloma'an. O mama mitiliday no pingkosi i Glasgow, o ina nai tadamaanay laloma'an i Hamilton ko sofoc. Misawad nai sinkakoyin i, tayra i Bren sinkakoyin no daykako to 1 miheca i Switzerland, ta itira i Mission no Gallowgate i Glasgow a matayal. Ira ko cecay dadaya matengil ningra ko nano sowal no hakasi ci Buckley to pakayniay pipatenak i Taywan, nanoya sa pacekil ko faloco' mihayda to tahidang no Kawas, patala to saka tayra i Taywan. Miliyas to kitakit tayra i Taywan Saka mitelek ci Mei Cienwu to saka tayni i Taywan, nika caay ka fana'en no mato'asay, nawhani mahadang to pilalang no mato'asay, mamalingad to han pasifana' to ina, saka mararom sato a tomangic ko ina, nanoyaan miliyas to salawina tayni i Taywan. Ira ci Dr. David Landsborough (Lan Tafiti), M.D. aci Rev. A.B.Nielson (Lien Tili), tatolo cangra i 1895 miheca 12 folad 18 romi'ad talasekal i Anpin, itira ci Lin Yincen singsi minanam to pasifana' to sowal no Payrang. Patenakay a Mei Cienwu I 1896 miheca 11 folad ci Mei Cienwu aci Lan Tafiti ising rakat sa tayra i Canghua, miteka patenak paising, patireng ko Inkiris ciwlo kiwkay i Canghua to saka tosa patenakan (itira Taynan ko todong), ci Mei Cienwu sa patireng i Dadu, Ailan, Qieding (Xiluo) to pacena'an, o pahanhanan no sinkiwsi a maro', manga'ay kinapinapina maro' to cecay mihecaan, misolap to kafiyaw niyaro' patireng to fa'elohay kiwkay, ikor matama to ko pacarcaran a kahiceraan maro', samatiyaen ni Mei Cienwu to no Inkiris mihacecay to niyaro' a misinting, misakamiday ko 'orip a patenak, o koheting epang no Scotland ko nikaenan, o matiyaay 'awa no siri a nisanga'an a la'pa, ano eca o sakongkong ko sapi'ang'ang to tamdaw sawal sa "masidayay no Kawas a wawa" saan ko pitahidang to finawlan a patenak, ano ira ko mitooray, itira sa micaliw to loma kamaro'an, itira padoedo mipatenak to Ratoh, maraod ko pa'aliwacan patorod han ko itiraay kiwkay macacaliw mikerid to lihay, ano eca ocoren ko tintosi pakatayal. Matiraay ko kalasida'it ni Mei Cienwu palecad to Lan Tafiti ising to isingan patenak, masamatira i tatenokan no Taywan nai 1896 miheca tangasa 1906 miheca to 10 mihecaan, mapatireng ko 18 a kiwkay itiya, o mitooray nai 1300 ko tamdaw matongal tangasa 4200 ko tamdaw, tatenokan no Taywan sa'etal halo Taycong, Canghua ato Nantu 1100 ko niyaro', nirakatan ni Mei Cienwu 900 ko niyaro' nipatenakan. Mapatireng ningra ko Lukang, Ershui, Liuyuan, Xihu, Qingshui, Dali, Fangyuan, Fengyuan, Caotun, Yuanlin, Chishui, Hemei, Zhushan, Dadu, Dacheng, Tianzhong, Beitou, Erlin a kiwkayan. Kawasan Mei Cienwu foksi Ci Mei Cienwu foksi o tadamaanay Kawasan i Inkiris tadamaanay, kala mitiliday ho a mihecaan, maocor no sinkakoyin tayra i Glasgow and Edinburgh sinkakoyin makihatiya to mihecaan kasasowalan sa'opo. I 1929 miheca matahidang mihakitiya i Bnuce Lecture, ni Blues papelo, patodongan i The Purpose of Christ (patosokan ni Kristo), ikor palatilidan koni a nisowalan. Ira ko 12 mitilidan a cudad ni Mei Cienwu foksi, 4 a tilidan no Taywan (piwiyci): Loma, sapatenak, to'ekan a kiwkay, kotosimon a tilidan. Ira ko 8 no Inkiris a cudad, 1.The Heathen Heart. 2.The Saints of Formosa. 3.Love's Long Campaign. 4.The mind of the Early Coverts. 5.Christ for us and is us. 6.The purpose of Christ. 7.The King Guest. 8.The childhood of the Church. I 1932 miheca nitilidan a The mind of the Early Coverts (Sarakatay to'ek faloco' no mifalicay) a tilidan mapatodong no Glasgow daykako to hakasi no Kawasan (D.D). Maradiway ci Mei Cienwu foksi Talolong ko saki radiwan ni Mei Cienwu foksi, matiya o fafahi ni Lan Taypi ising malatiyin no katimolay daykay misanga' to radiw, nisanga'an ningra telangay radiw saka 25A, 45, 46, 217, 266 limaay a radiw. Tatenokan adihayay kiwkay a sikatay cingra ko pasa'opoay misakapot. Kararamod ni Mei Cienwu foksi I 1908 miheca ci ramod ci Mei Cienwu foksi aci Miss Margaret Findlay, o nano Glasgow daykako a hakasi ci Dr. Larkhou a wawa to fafahiyan, nika karaadadaay ko tireng, sapidipotaw ni Mei Cienwu foksi tayra i New Zealand, Japan ko pipaising, masakalimelaan i 1915 miheca 11 folad 8 romi'ad a mapatay, pitadem toya romi'ad I lalan no Canghua i, oya nikeridan ni Mei Cienwu foksi a sikatay mitomtomay miparadiw to "Awaay ko pades i kakarayan mida'oc ko 'orip" sanay o pipatenak todong koni. I 1922 miheca, ci Mei Cienwu foksi ciramod to kakeridan kangkoho no Canghua isingan ci Miss Margaret Arthur itiya, ikor citodongay to fafahiyan a tayal no Inkiris ciwlo kiwkay to pinapina mihecaan. Ira ko 76 mihecaan mapatay i Inkiris. O katadamaan ni Mei Cienwu foksi (1) Malalokay ko tayal Caay ka rorayen patenak ci Mei Cienwu foksi, mihadidi to so'aw ato cahiw, kacidalan ka'oradan caay pahanhan, ira ko pasowalay cingraan eca to haenen ko roray, masamo'aw to tatirengan, paca'of sa ikaka to koedaway no 'orip ko nga'ay, mapatay i tayal no Kawan o kalipahakan. (2) Kao niyah to no tao ko pisafangcal Saka'emed sa ko kaciriko' no niyah, o cecay romi'ad no sinkiwsi, samatiya sa o miki'a'amay ko kaciriko' no Inkiris ci Mei Cienwu foksi, misa'icel pacakat to payso, pacakat to 4500 sapatireng to kiwkay no Canghua, pacakat to 1000 payso sapatireng to Nanto kiwkay, pacakat to 1000 payso sapatireng to Tayciw kiwkay, roma i, o Qingshui, Caotun, Ershui, Xihu, Pingtung, Douliu kiwkay ato sera ko pacakay, halipadangay to pakoyocay, adadaay, tintosi, patado micoker to sadama, makalic sa to cinamalay o sasereday kisya, materek ko payso, maala ko 2 miheca mapatireng ko 1 kiwkay. (3) Malalen ko nengneng Malalen ko nengneng to cidafongay, ci'icelay tamdaw ato caayay ka tadamaan nengnengen a tamdaw, o sedi no tawa ko sapilitemoh, pananom, o sowal no Taywan tamdaw ko pilicay, masadak talapotal o niya sa ko miwikiday, caay palifot to tao, sowal sa cingra: "Ci Yis komi'orongay to ciwcika no niyah" saan. Ira ko cecay romi'ad, i Sihu misinting cikafoti'an to toloay laya' ko dadahal aci Lin Siekong foksi padal, itira sa i Nanto misinting koemeday a liwkang ko kamaro'an, hadidi sa to pikalat no cenget a mafoti'. (4) Halitolonay Ci Mei Cienwu foksi, 'ayaw no pisinting, ikor o pitolon, manengneng to no lafalafang ko pitolon ningra, i parad no kiwkay, mateli ko misac no salikaka, rariden ningra a mitolon. Mapatay Na patiko nai Taya misinting ci Mei Cienwu foksi, madenga no lifong, i 1924 miheca minokay tayra Inkiris. I 1927 miheca nai Scotland patono to ta'angay toki pafeli to Canghua kiwkay piharatengan to 'ayaway fafahi ci Miss Margaret Findlayan. I 1940 miheca 2 folad 28 romi'ad mapatay i Lennoxtown no Scotland. Toya miheca, 6 folad 13 romi'ad, Tayciw ciwkay midemak to piharatengan cingraan a lihay i Canghua kiwkay.
S.PHON: == məi ʦiənwo~u~u fo~uksi == məi ʦiənwo~u~u (rəb~v. ʦampb~b~vəɾɾ naismitħ mo~uo~uɬ~ɮj,****-****), o~u sʦo~utɾanɬ~ɮ a tamɬ~ɮaw, i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maso~ufo~uʦ i b~b~vənb~vo~u~uə b~b~vo~utħwaɾɾ no~u sʦo~utɾanɬ~ɮ, o~u mama ʦi ro~ub~b~vərt mo~uo~uɬ~ɮj, o~u ina ʦi marj əwiŋ naismitħ, * ko~u fafaħijan a kaka, * ko~u kaka to~u faʡinajan, * ko~u safa to~u faʡinajan, o~u mito~uo~uraj to~u wama a kawas a ɾaɾo~umaʡan. o~u mama mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj no~u piŋko~usi i *ɾas*o~uw, o~u ina nai taɬ~ɮamaanaj ɾaɾo~umaʡan i ħamiɾto~un ko~u so~ufo~uʦ. misawaɬ~ɮ nai sinkako~ujin i, tajra i b~b~vrən sinkako~ujin no~u ɬ~ɮajkako~u to~u * miħəʦa i swit*ərɾanɬ~ɮ, ta itira i missio~un no~u *aɾɾo~uw*atə i *ɾas*o~uw a matajaɾ. ira ko~u ʦəʦaj ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja matəŋiɾ niŋra ko~u nano~u so~uwaɾ no~u ħakasi ʦi b~b~vo~u~uʦkɾəj to~u pakajniaj pipatənak i tajwan, nano~uja sa paʦəkiɾ ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ miħajɬ~ɮa to~u taħiɬ~ɮaŋ no~u kawas, pataɾa to~u saka tajra i tajwan. miɾijas to~u kitakit tajra i tajwan saka mitəɾək ʦi məi ʦiənwo~u~u to~u saka tajni i tajwan, nika ʦaaj ka fanaʡən no~u mato~uʡasaj, nawħani maħaɬ~ɮaŋ to~u piɾaɾaŋ no~u mato~uʡasaj, mamaɾiŋaɬ~ɮ to~u ħan pasifanaʡ to~u ina, saka mararo~um sato~u a to~umaŋiʦ ko~u ina, nano~ujaan miɾijas to~u saɾawina tajni i tajwan. ira ʦi ɬ~ɮr. ɬ~ɮab~viɬ~ɮ ɾanɬ~ɮsb~b~vo~uro~uo~u~u*ħ (ɾan tafiti), m.ɬ~ɮ. aʦi rəb~v. a.b~b~v.niəɾso~un (ɾiən tiɾi), tato~uɾo~u ʦaŋra i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ taɾasəkaɾ i anpin, itira ʦi ɾin jinʦən siŋsi minanam to~u pasifanaʡ to~u so~uwaɾ no~u pajraŋ. patənakaj a məi ʦiənwo~u~u i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ʦi məi ʦiənwo~u~u aʦi ɾan tafiti isiŋ rakat sa tajra i ʦaŋħo~u~ua, mitəka patənak paisiŋ, patirəŋ ko~u inkiris ʦiwɾo~u kiwkaj i ʦaŋħo~u~ua to~u saka to~usa patənakan (itira tajnan ko~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ), ʦi məi ʦiənwo~u~u sa patirəŋ i ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~u~u, aiɾan, *iəɬ~ɮiŋ (xiɾo~u~uo~u) to~u paʦənaʡan, o~u paħanħanan no~u sinkiwsi a maro~uʡ, maŋaʡaj kinapinapina maro~uʡ to~u ʦəʦaj miħəʦaan, miso~uɾap to~u kafijaw nijaro~uʡ patirəŋ to~u faʡəɾo~uħaj kiwkaj, iko~ur matama to~u ko~u paʦarʦaran a kaħiʦəraan maro~uʡ, samatijaən ni məi ʦiənwo~u~u to~u no~u inkiris miħaʦəʦaj to~u nijaro~uʡ a misintiŋ, misakamiɬ~ɮaj ko~u ʡo~urip a patənak, o~u ko~uħətiŋ əpaŋ no~u sʦo~utɾanɬ~ɮ ko~u nikaənan, o~u matijaaj ʡawa no~u siri a nisaŋaʡan a ɾaʡpa, ano~u əʦa o~u sako~uŋko~uŋ ko~u sapiʡaŋʡaŋ to~u tamɬ~ɮaw sawaɾ sa "masiɬ~ɮajaj no~u kawas a wawa" saan ko~u pitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u finawɾan a patənak, ano~u ira ko~u mito~uo~uraj, itira sa miʦaɾiw to~u ɾo~uma kamaro~uʡan, itira paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u mipatənak to~u rato~uħ, marao~uɬ~ɮ ko~u paʡaɾiwaʦan pato~uro~uɬ~ɮ ħan ko~u itiraaj kiwkaj maʦaʦaɾiw mikəriɬ~ɮ to~u ɾiħaj, ano~u əʦa o~uʦo~urən ko~u tinto~usi pakatajaɾ. matiraaj ko~u kaɾasiɬ~ɮaʡit ni məi ʦiənwo~u~u paɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u ɾan tafiti isiŋ to~u isiŋan patənak, masamatira i tatəno~ukan no~u tajwan nai **** miħəʦa taŋasa **** miħəʦa to~u ** miħəʦaan, mapatirəŋ ko~u ** a kiwkaj itija, o~u mito~uo~uraj nai **** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw mato~uŋaɾ taŋasa **** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, tatəno~ukan no~u tajwan saʡətaɾ ħaɾo~u tajʦo~uŋ, ʦaŋħo~u~ua ato~u nanto~u~u **** ko~u nijaro~uʡ, nirakatan ni məi ʦiənwo~u~u *** ko~u nijaro~uʡ nipatənakan. mapatirəŋ niŋra ko~u ɾo~u~ukaŋ, ərsħo~u~ui, ɾio~u~ujo~u~uan, xiħo~u~u, *iŋsħo~u~ui, ɬ~ɮaɾi, faŋjo~u~uan, fəŋjo~u~uan, ʦao~uto~u~un, jo~u~uanɾin, ʦħisħo~u~ui, ħəməi, *ħo~u~usħan, ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~u~u, ɬ~ɮaʦħəŋ, tian*ħo~uŋ, b~b~vəito~uo~u~u, ərɾin a kiwkajan. kawasan məi ʦiənwo~u~u fo~uksi ʦi məi ʦiənwo~u~u fo~uksi o~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj kawasan i inkiris taɬ~ɮamaanaj, kaɾa mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj ħo~u a miħəʦaan, mao~uʦo~ur no~u sinkako~ujin tajra i *ɾas*o~uw anɬ~ɮ əɬ~ɮinb~b~vo~u~ur*ħ sinkako~ujin makiħatija to~u miħəʦaan kasaso~uwaɾan saʡo~upo~u. i **** miħəʦa mataħiɬ~ɮaŋ miħakitija i b~b~vno~u~uʦə ɾəʦto~u~urə, ni b~b~vɾo~u~uəs papəɾo~u, pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan i tħə po~u~urpo~usə o~uf ʦħrist (pato~uso~ukan ni kristo~u), iko~ur paɾatiɾiɬ~ɮan ko~uni a niso~uwaɾan. ira ko~u ** mitiɾiɬ~ɮan a ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ ni məi ʦiənwo~u~u fo~uksi, * a tiɾiɬ~ɮan no~u tajwan (piwijʦi): ɾo~uma, sapatənak, to~uʡəkan a kiwkaj, ko~uto~usimo~un a tiɾiɬ~ɮan. ira ko~u * no~u inkiris a ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, *.tħə ħəatħən ħəart. *.tħə saints o~uf fo~urmo~usa. *.ɾo~ub~vəʡs ɾo~uŋ ʦampai*n. *.tħə minɬ~ɮ o~uf tħə əarɾj ʦo~ub~vərts. *.ʦħrist fo~ur o~u~us anɬ~ɮ is o~u~us. *.tħə po~u~urpo~usə o~uf ʦħrist. *.tħə kiŋ *o~u~uəst. *.tħə ʦħiɾɬ~ɮħo~uo~uɬ~ɮ o~uf tħə ʦħo~u~urʦħ. i **** miħəʦa nitiɾiɬ~ɮan a tħə minɬ~ɮ o~uf tħə əarɾj ʦo~ub~vərts (sarakataj to~uʡək faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u mifaɾiʦaj) a tiɾiɬ~ɮan mapato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u *ɾas*o~uw ɬ~ɮajkako~u to~u ħakasi no~u kawasan (ɬ~ɮ.ɬ~ɮ). maraɬ~ɮiwaj ʦi məi ʦiənwo~u~u fo~uksi taɾo~uɾo~uŋ ko~u saki raɬ~ɮiwan ni məi ʦiənwo~u~u fo~uksi, matija o~u fafaħi ni ɾan tajpi isiŋ maɾatijin no~u katimo~uɾaj ɬ~ɮajkaj misaŋaʡ to~u raɬ~ɮiw, nisaŋaʡan niŋra təɾaŋaj raɬ~ɮiw saka **a, **, **, ***, *** ɾimaaj a raɬ~ɮiw. tatəno~ukan aɬ~ɮiħajaj kiwkaj a sikataj ʦiŋra ko~u pasaʡo~upo~uaj misakapo~ut. kararamo~uɬ~ɮ ni məi ʦiənwo~u~u fo~uksi i **** miħəʦa ʦi ramo~uɬ~ɮ ʦi məi ʦiənwo~u~u fo~uksi aʦi miss mar*arət finɬ~ɮɾaj, o~u nano~u *ɾas*o~uw ɬ~ɮajkako~u a ħakasi ʦi ɬ~ɮr. ɾarkħo~uo~u~u a wawa to~u fafaħijan, nika karaaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj ko~u tirəŋ, sapiɬ~ɮipo~utaw ni məi ʦiənwo~u~u fo~uksi tajra i nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ, *apan ko~u pipaisiŋ, masakaɾiməɾaan i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a mapataj, pitaɬ~ɮəm to~uja ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i ɾaɾan no~u ʦaŋħo~u~ua i, o~uja nikəriɬ~ɮan ni məi ʦiənwo~u~u fo~uksi a sikataj mito~umto~umaj miparaɬ~ɮiw to~u "awaaj ko~u paɬ~ɮəs i kakarajan miɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ ko~u ʡo~urip" sanaj o~u pipatənak to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ko~uni. i **** miħəʦa, ʦi məi ʦiənwo~u~u fo~uksi ʦiramo~uɬ~ɮ to~u kakəriɬ~ɮan kaŋko~uħo~u no~u ʦaŋħo~u~ua isiŋan ʦi miss mar*arət artħo~u~ur itija, iko~ur ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u fafaħijan a tajaɾ no~u inkiris ʦiwɾo~u kiwkaj to~u pinapina miħəʦaan. ira ko~u ** miħəʦaan mapataj i inkiris. o~u kataɬ~ɮamaan ni məi ʦiənwo~u~u fo~uksi (*) maɾaɾo~ukaj ko~u tajaɾ ʦaaj ka ro~urajən patənak ʦi məi ʦiənwo~u~u fo~uksi, miħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮi to~u so~uʡaw ato~u ʦaħiw, kaʦiɬ~ɮaɾan kaʡo~uraɬ~ɮan ʦaaj paħanħan, ira ko~u paso~uwaɾaj ʦiŋraan əʦa to~u ħaənən ko~u ro~uraj, masamo~uʡaw to~u tatirəŋan, paʦaʡo~uf sa ikaka to~u ko~uəɬ~ɮawaj no~u ʡo~urip ko~u ŋaʡaj, mapataj i tajaɾ no~u kawan o~u kaɾipaħakan. (*) kao~u nijaħ to~u no~u tao~u ko~u pisafaŋʦaɾ sakaʡəməɬ~ɮ sa ko~u kaʦiriko~uʡ no~u nijaħ, o~u ʦəʦaj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ no~u sinkiwsi, samatija sa o~u mikiʡaʡamaj ko~u kaʦiriko~uʡ no~u inkiris ʦi məi ʦiənwo~u~u fo~uksi, misaʡiʦəɾ paʦakat to~u pajso~u, paʦakat to~u **** sapatirəŋ to~u kiwkaj no~u ʦaŋħo~u~ua, paʦakat to~u **** pajso~u sapatirəŋ to~u nanto~u kiwkaj, paʦakat to~u **** pajso~u sapatirəŋ to~u tajʦiw kiwkaj, ro~uma i, o~u *iŋsħo~u~ui, ʦao~uto~u~un, ərsħo~u~ui, xiħo~u~u, piŋto~u~uŋ, ɬ~ɮo~uo~u~uɾio~u~u kiwkaj ato~u səra ko~u paʦakaj, ħaɾipaɬ~ɮaŋaj to~u pako~ujo~uʦaj, aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj, tinto~usi, pataɬ~ɮo~u miʦo~ukər to~u saɬ~ɮama, makaɾiʦ sa to~u ʦinamaɾaj o~u sasərəɬ~ɮaj kisja, matərək ko~u pajso~u, maaɾa ko~u * miħəʦa mapatirəŋ ko~u * kiwkaj. (*) maɾaɾən ko~u nəŋnəŋ maɾaɾən ko~u nəŋnəŋ to~u ʦiɬ~ɮafo~uŋaj, ʦiʡiʦəɾaj tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u ʦaajaj ka taɬ~ɮamaan nəŋnəŋən a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u səɬ~ɮi no~u tawa ko~u sapiɾitəmo~uħ, panano~um, o~u so~uwaɾ no~u tajwan tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u piɾiʦaj, masaɬ~ɮak taɾapo~utaɾ o~u nija sa ko~u miwikiɬ~ɮaj, ʦaaj paɾifo~ut to~u tao~u, so~uwaɾ sa ʦiŋra: "ʦi jis ko~umiʡo~uro~uŋaj to~u ʦiwʦika no~u nijaħ" saan. ira ko~u ʦəʦaj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, i siħo~u~u misintiŋ ʦikafo~utiʡan to~u to~uɾo~uaj ɾajaʡ ko~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾ aʦi ɾin siəko~uŋ fo~uksi paɬ~ɮaɾ, itira sa i nanto~u misintiŋ ko~uəməɬ~ɮaj a ɾiwkaŋ ko~u kamaro~uʡan, ħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮi sa to~u pikaɾat no~u ʦəŋət a mafo~utiʡ. (*) ħaɾito~uɾo~unaj ʦi məi ʦiənwo~u~u fo~uksi, ʡajaw no~u pisintiŋ, iko~ur o~u pito~uɾo~un, manəŋnəŋ to~u no~u ɾafaɾafaŋ ko~u pito~uɾo~un niŋra, i paraɬ~ɮ no~u kiwkaj, matəɾi ko~u misaʦ no~u saɾikaka, rariɬ~ɮən niŋra a mito~uɾo~un. mapataj na patiko~u nai taja misintiŋ ʦi məi ʦiənwo~u~u fo~uksi, maɬ~ɮəŋa no~u ɾifo~uŋ, i **** miħəʦa mino~ukaj tajra inkiris. i **** miħəʦa nai sʦo~utɾanɬ~ɮ pato~uno~u to~u taʡaŋaj to~uki pafəɾi to~u ʦaŋħo~u~ua kiwkaj piħaratəŋan to~u ʡajawaj fafaħi ʦi miss mar*arət finɬ~ɮɾajan. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ mapataj i ɾənno~uxto~uwn no~u sʦo~utɾanɬ~ɮ. to~uja miħəʦa, * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, tajʦiw ʦiwkaj miɬ~ɮəmak to~u piħaratəŋan ʦiŋraan a ɾiħaj i ʦaŋħo~u~ua kiwkaj.
